goal: Test unsolicited donation, first-depositor, tiny-deposit, and flash-loan share-supply manipulation against vault share math.
setup_requirements: attacker ability to transfer underlying directly
minimal_state: attacker can donate underlying or flash manipulate supply
assertions: victim deposit does not revert unexpectedly or lose material value
attacker cannot drain yield or force share price distortion
common_failures: ignoring direct ERC20 transfer to vault
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
